name: Geometric Plague
identity: A mysterious, structured force manifesting in the environment through hexagonal melt patterns, crystalline growths, and pulsating stones. It subtly reshapes the landscape, creating an eerie, geometric order in the thawing wilderness.
notes: Entity was auto-created previously; updated based on environmental descriptions in turn-268 and further observations in turn-270 and turn-274.
current_status: Exhibiting a persistent disruption at a boundary point, with subtle instability in the main stones' rhythm. The system is unable to fully ignore the flaw, as it must divert some attention to the continuous imperfection.

appearance.value: Hexagonal melt patterns, crystalline growths with sterile blue light, pulsating stones

effect.value: Subtle reshaping of the environment through geometric patterns

origin.value: Unspecified, referenced in rumors and environmental anomalies

volatile_state.condition: Active and present, influencing the environment with subtle instability
volatile_state.location: Thawing wilderness near the river bend
volatile_state.current_activity: Maintaining geometric patterns in snow, stone, and water, with observed energetic flow and structured influence over the landscape, while exhibiting a persistent disruption at a boundary point
